calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Health.
Lita Angeles, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under and testified.
No appearance by defendant Donald Evans.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on October 29, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Three (3) Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated 09/21908-----------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Health, and against defendant Donald Evans as follows:

Plaintiff Tenderloin Health shall recover from defendant Donald Evans past-due rent in the amount of $998.01, holdover damages in the amount of $778.08, and costs in the amount of $195.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $1,971.09.

Plaintiff Tenderloin Health is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 64 Turk Street, #215, San Francisco, CA 94102. The rental agreement is canceled.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibit.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: arnold w. evje, appearing for PLAINTIFF tenderloin health. defendant is not present in court and is not represented by counsel.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR DUE TO NON APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. TRIAL DATE REMAINS. JURY TRIAL IS NOT STRICKEN.

COMMISSIONER william gargano, CLERK LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED (218).
